productName: Nano Tincture - Beauty Sleep 4:2:1 (50mg CBD;100mg THC;25mg CBN)
description: A versatile tincture for customers who prefer smoke-free dosing, with precise drops and a smooth, steady cannabis experience. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest in a 4:2:1 ratio. Perfect for winding down at the end of the day. Discreet, precise, and easy to dose.
